title: AREG Registry Entry
description: Schema Commons SC-013 — Agent Registry (AREG) v0.1.0. A registry entry records that a specific version of an AAIF-format agent definition is available for discovery and resolution.

sc_standard.description: Must be the string 'SC-013'. Identifies this document as an AREG registry entry.

registry_id.description: Stable UUID assigned by the registry at publish time. Never changes across version bumps of the same entry.

agent_id.description: The AAIF agent_id from the referenced agent definition. Must match the agent_id field in the AAIF document at aaif_url.

agent_version.description: SemVer version of the agent definition. Must match the version field in the AAIF document.

published_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime when this registry entry was first published.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime of the most recent metadata update to this entry (not the agent version).

publisher.description: Identity of the party publishing this registry entry.

public_key_url.description: URL to the publisher's JWK Set or PEM public key, used to verify the signature field.

contact.description: Contact email or URI for abuse/security reports.

aaif_url.description: Resolvable URL where the full AAIF agent definition document can be fetched. Must return a valid AAIF document with matching agent_id and agent_version.

signature.description: Base64url-encoded detached JWS signature over the canonical JSON of the AAIF document at aaif_url. Verifiable using the public key at publisher.public_key_url. Null for unsigned entries.

tags.description: Free-form topic tags for search and discovery. Lowercase, hyphenated preferred.

conformance_level.description: Highest AAIF conformance level the agent claims, as declared in its AAIF document.

required_capabilities.description: Copy of required_capabilities[] from the AAIF agent definition. Allows filtering without fetching the full AAIF document.

acpm_profile_url.description: Optional URL to an ACPM (SC-014) capability profile document that further describes what this agent offers. Null if no profile is published.

yanked.description: If true, this version has been retracted. The entry remains in the registry but MUST NOT be used for new deployments.

yank_reason.description: Human-readable reason for yanking. Null if not yanked.

license.description: SPDX license identifier for the agent definition document itself.

_comment.description: Non-normative comment for documentation purposes. Stripped before validation.
